title: constructor cleanups perf (was jssm#720)
manager: Reduce the work the machine constructor does on the hot path — the per-instance setup that runs every time a machine is created, which dominates workloads that spin up many short-lived machines. Constructor cost is paid on every `new`, so trimming it is one of the highest-frequency perf levers in the whole runtime.
cs: perf-track lever; verify with graviton envelope, not local timings
